subject: [PATCHv7 07/18] mm: Rework compound_head() for power-of-2 sizeof(struct page)

reviews.author: Kiryl Shutsemau (Meta)
reviews.summary: The patch series is a rework of the compound_head() function to use a mask for power-of-2 sized struct pages, allowing for identical tail pages and paving the way for eliminating fake heads in HugeTLB Vmemmap Optimization (HVO).

2026-02-27.patch_summary: This patch series reworks the compound_head() function to use a mask for power-of-2 sized struct pages, allowing for identical tail pages and paving the way for eliminating fake heads in HugeTLB Vmemmap Optimization (HVO). The modification is limited to HVO where it makes a difference, as validating natural alignment of struct pages for all orders can be tricky.
